---
title: "AEM 6850"
pagetitle: "AEM 6850 · Fall 2026"
---

::: {.aem-hero}

<span class="wip-badge">Work in Progress</span>

<p class="hero-eyebrow">AEM 6850</p>

<h1 class="hero-title">Course site coming Fall 2026</h1>

<p class="hero-meta">
This page is a placeholder. The full site for AEM 6850 will be published
here ahead of the Fall 2026 semester.
</p>

:::

::: {.aem-panel}

## About

AEM 6850 is taught by [Prof. Ariel Ortiz-Bobea](https://arielortizbobea.github.io)
at the Charles H. Dyson School of Applied Economics and Management,
Cornell University.

For a sense of the format and tooling philosophy, see the related course
[AEM 7010 (Spring 2026)](https://arielortizbobea.github.io/aem7010/spring-2026/).

:::
